etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") + dots (flames) -> sacrifice with fire -> 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") added to emphasize fire used in sacrifice
etymology.interpretation: 尞 originally depicted a tree with flames, symbolizing a ritual sacrifice using firewood, with later addition of 火 to emphasize the fire aspect. Though it later gained phonetic associations, its roots lie in an ideogrammatic depiction of fire-based sacrifices.
